# Electronics & Communication Engineering

Established 2007

[Faculty](/departments/ece/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To excel in electronics and communication engineering education with focus on innovation and research.

### Mission

* Provide comprehensive education in electronics and communication
* Encourage research in VLSI, embedded systems, and communications
* Build industry partnerships for practical exposure
* Develop socially responsible engineers

## Programs Offered

### B.E. Electronics & Communication Engineering

Duration: 4 yearsIntake: 120

### M.E. VLSI Design

Duration: 2 yearsIntake: 18

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* Basic Electronics Lab
* Digital Electronics Lab
* Microprocessor Lab
* Communication Lab
* VLSI Lab
* Embedded Systems Lab
